productDisplayName: Timberland Men Toddler Brown Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in casual comfort in the timberland Powerplay sandals. Designed with leather and rubber, this floater offers ample breathable comfort and keeps your young one's feet fresh and dry all day long.UpperSuede and nubuck upper with velcro closures on the forefoot and midfoot for ultimate comfort, breathability and to offer a customised FitComplete padded fabric inner lining with a cushioned and meshed collar for all-day comfortCushioned foam footbed for sweat-free all-day comfortOutsoleGrippy non-marking rubber outsole with leaf-shaped lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and heel, and hexagonal lugs on the mid-forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionOutsole embeded onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guardFloater careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothUse a nubuck and suede brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
